name: skill extracts the before-state file content from the unified diff of a single-file PR
command:
mkdir -p pr && printf 'diff --git a/x.js b/x.js
--- a/x.js
+++ b/x.js
@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
-const a=eval(s)
+const a=safeParse(s)
' > pr/diff.patch && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/pr-to-eval-dataset/extract.sh" --diff pr/diff.patch --emit before --out before.txt 2>err.txt && grep -q 'eval(s)' before.txt && ! grep -q 'safeParse' before.txt && echo ok 1>&2
